emotional_tones.name: Calm
emotional_tones.description: Peaceful, relaxed, soothing — content that reduces tension and promotes tranquility

emotional_tones.name: Focused
emotional_tones.description: Concentrated, attentive, engaged — content that demands and rewards sustained attention

emotional_tones.name: Energized
emotional_tones.description: Activated, pumped, high-energy — content that raises arousal and drives action

emotional_tones.name: Amused
emotional_tones.description: Entertained, light-hearted, laughing — content that produces joy and laughter

emotional_tones.name: Inspired
emotional_tones.description: Motivated, uplifted, aspirational — content that sparks ambition and possibility

emotional_tones.name: Reflective
emotional_tones.description: Thoughtful, contemplative, introspective — content that promotes deeper thinking

boolean_flags.name: Rage Bait
boolean_flags.description: Content designed to provoke outrage or anger for engagement

boolean_flags.name: Humiliation
boolean_flags.description: Content that derives entertainment from degrading or embarrassing people

boolean_flags.name: Shock Content
boolean_flags.description: Content designed to shock or disturb for attention

boolean_flags.name: Inflammatory
boolean_flags.description: Content designed to inflame political or social division

boolean_flags.name: Violence
boolean_flags.description: Content containing graphic violence or gore
